name: Dolmas - Stuffed Grape Leaves
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp fresh parsley, minced (do not use dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place grape leaves in a flat bowl. Pour boiling water over and drain.
2. Sauté onion in 2 tablespoons olive oil until soft. Add parsley, rice, nuts, dill, raisins, and lemon peel. Cook for 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally, until nuts are lightly browned.
3. Transfer mixture to a mixing bowl with 1 1/2 cups broth. Spoon the filling into each grape leaf, rolling tightly while tucking in the ends.
4. Arrange stuffed leaves seam side down in a deep kettle or Dutch oven. Pour half of the broth mixture over the leaves.
5. Add remaining leaves and broth mixture. Return to boiling point, cover, and reduce heat to simmer for 45 minutes.
6. Serve at room temperature, but they can also be served hot or cold.
